stories.headline: Box Office: ‘Minions & Monsters’ Scares Up $16 Million on Friday - Variety
stories.summary: 'Minions & Monsters' is taking over the box office for Independence Day weekend.

stories.headline: 'So personal and so intimate': 'GMA' anchors describe Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce wedding - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
Tate McRae Glued to Phone After Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's Wedding - TMZ
stories.summary: Tate McRae had the most relatable moment when she got her phone back after having it locked up for Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding -- she was glued to it!

stories.headline: Beyoncé Delivers Fourth of July Fireworks With Surprise New Song ‘Morning Dew (Donk)’ - Rolling Stone
stories.summary: Beyoncé delivered fireworks on the Fourth of July as she released "Morning Dew (Donk)," her first new song in two years and set for a 'B'Day' reissue.

stories.headline: Donald Trump Tries to Troll Taylor Swift on Her Wedding Night, But She Parties on - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: The specter of a wedding on a holiday he seeks to own seemed to irk the president, or at least the staff manning the White House Instagram feed.
